creator: rom_glsa@ein-hashofet.co.il
text:
Updated the gIDE port from version 0.0.4 to 0.0.6.

passes portlint and everything else.

Im not sure if I should submit patches to the original port or just the entire
thing all over again, because it really changed alot. so let me know
if I did something wrong.

uuencoded port tarball:
